2026-04-22T17:45:23.2033689Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-22T17:45:23.2034248Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-22T17:45:23.2034689Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-22T17:45:23.2035058Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-22T17:45:23.2035364Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-22T17:45:23.2035595Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-22T17:45:23.2035754Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-22T17:45:23.2035928Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-22T17:45:23.2036098Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-22T17:45:23.2036327Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-22T17:45:23.2036519Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-22T17:45:23.2036808Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-22T17:45:23.2037476Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

That conflicts (CS0433) with the Identity types now type-forwarded by `Azure.Core 1.53`. The published `Azure.AI.Projects 2.1.0-beta.1` depends only on `Azure.Core 1.53` and does not pull `Azure.Identity`.\\n\\n**Files containing the override** (delete the `Azure.AI.Projects` `PackageVersion Update` lines and their `TEMPORARY` comment blocks once the central version is bumped):\\n- `eng/centralpackagemanagement/overrides/Azure.Projects.Packages.props`\\n- `eng/centralpackagemanagement/overrides/Azure.Projects.Provisioning.Packages.props`\\n- `eng/centralpackagemanagement/overrides/Azure.Projects.AI.Foundry.Packages.props`\\n\\n**Cleanup steps once `Azure.AI.Projects 2.1.0` GA ships:**\\n1.
